items.text: SearchAttribute type enum (String, Int, Float, Bool, Datetime, KeywordList) and SearchAttributeSchema exist in aion-core.
SearchAttributesUpdated event variant exists in aion-core.
VisibilityStore trait in aion-store with record_visibility, list_workflows, and count_workflows.
WorkflowSummary projection type with id, run_id, type, status, start/close time, and search attributes.
ListWorkflowsFilter supports predicates for workflow type, status, time range, and custom attribute values.
libSQL VisibilityStore implementation with indexed standard fields and JSON custom attributes.
Engine updates visibility index on WorkflowStarted, WorkflowCompleted, WorkflowFailed, WorkflowCancelled, and SearchAttributesUpdated events.
SDK binding: workflow.upsert_search_attributes records a SearchAttributesUpdated event.
Search attribute type registration per namespace; type mismatch on set is an error.
aion-server exposes list_workflows and count_workflows via gRPC and HTTP.
Visibility queries return WorkflowSummary, not full event history.
Integration test: workflow sets custom attributes, visibility query finds it by attribute value.
